title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at AFL Logistics

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at AFL Logistics
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at AFL Logistics. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About AFL Logistics:
AFL Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AFL Logistics!
